title: poa caespitosa var. serpentum
intro: Poa caespitosa var. serpentum, also known as serpent's grass or mountain bluegrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to the mountainous regions of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Poa caespitosa var. serpentum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and aid in the treatment of digestive issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically made by drying the leaves and stems of the plant and steeping them in hot water.
